classification.important_but_undiscovered: 110 guides + 35 comparisons — good templates, no crawl
classification.thin_duplicate_risk: 225 tools — high risk of diluting authority
classification.cleanup_lag: ~10 — old pages that should be removed from sitemap
classification.needs_internal_links: ~150 — guides and comparisons that need links from indexed pages

phase_1_internal_links.source_pages: Indexed blog posts + calculator pages + decision pages
phase_1_internal_links.action: Add 2-3 contextual links per guide from indexed, relevant pages

phase_2_quality_upgrades.action: Add FAQ sections, real examples, and calculator CTAs to comparison pages

phase_3_consolidation_review.action: Review 25/week. Remove from sitemap if confirmed duplicates. Hold otherwise.

phase_4_hold.action: Blogs already have content. Focus on CTR fixes and internal links to guides.

note: Phase 16.12G (title + Article schema) and Phase 17 CTR fixes address the quality issues. Internal links from indexed pages are the primary discovery accelerator.
